name: Double Free
description: The product calls free() twice on the same memory address, corrupting memory management data structures. This can allow attackers to overwrite arbitrary memory, execute arbitrary code, or crash the application.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node performing memory deallocation (free, delete) on a pointer that has already been deallocated by a prior TRANSFORM node along any reachable code path, without a CONTROL node resetting or nullifying the pointer between the two operations
